violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. -Food product was found stored on the floor in the food storage area.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Shelves need sealed in kitchen. Bare wood is exposed.

Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Food contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. -French Fry cutter was not cleaned properly after use. -Microwave had build up and needs cleaning -Ice machine has white build up around tub

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Shelf liners have build up. Needs cleaned up--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Hood system has build up and needs cleaned
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. -Plates and baskets stored vertically.
Backflow prevention. — --Backflow prevention device has not been installed or maintained on faucet as required. Backflow prevention device damaged and replaced with bolt at utility sink faucet.
